description_long: This object is a stylized representation of a rabbit, characterized by elongated, angular limbs and a sharply pointed head. The body is composed of thin, flat planes that converge at the top, forming the head and ears, which are long and upright. The overall form is abstract, with no visible facial features or detailed anatomical elements, giving it a modern, sculptural appearance. The coloration is a deep, uniform brown, resembling stained or polished wood. The legs are slender and splayed outward, contributing to a dynamic, upward-reaching posture. The surface appears hard and smooth, with a subtle sheen that suggests a finished wooden or metallic material.
description: A stylized, angular brown rabbit sculpture with long upright ears and splayed slender legs, featuring a smooth, hard surface and a modern abstract form.
description_view_0: Only the tip of a long, thin brown limb is visible, suggesting the extremity of one of the rabbit's legs.
description_view_1: A side view showing the elongated, angular body and one upright ear, with the slender leg extending downward.
description_view_2: A top-down or frontal view revealing the convergence of multiple thin limbs and the pointed head with two upright ears.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, but from the opposite side, showing the angular body and upright ear.
attribute_ear_orientation: Both ears are upright and sharply pointed, extending vertically from the top of the head.
attribute_fur_pattern: The surface is uniformly colored in a deep brown with no visible markings, spots, or gradients, giving it a consistent appearance throughout.
attribute_leg_posture: The legs are long, thin, and splayed outward in an extended, upright posture, contributing to a dynamic, upward-reaching stance.
